title: Choking Child
description: A parent calls in a panic because their young child is choking on a toy and can't breathe.
initial_variations: Help! My baby is choking! {caller_name} here, my son {victim_name} put a small toy in his mouth and now he can't breathe!
Oh God, {caller_name} speaking! My daughter {victim_name} was playing and now she's turning blue. I think she swallowed a Lego!
Emergency! I'm {caller_name}. My toddler {victim_name} is choking on something. He's not coughing, just silent and grabbing his throat!
Please send help! My niece {victim_name} is choking on a grape! I'm {caller_name}, we're in the kitchen!

initial: We're at {address_location}. Please hurry!
object_expelled: I'm at {address_location}. The object is out, but he's not breathing!
victim_stabilized: We're at {address_location}. He's breathing now, but paramedics should still come.

initial: It's my son {victim_name}, he's {victim_age}. He put {specific_details} in his mouth. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
attempting_heimlich: I've been doing back blows, but {victim_name} is still choking. {ambient_audio} is getting fainter.
object_expelled: The {specific_details} came out! But {victim_name} is limp and pale. {ambient_audio} stopped.
victim_stabilized: {victim_name} coughed up {specific_details}. He's crying now, breathing normally. I'm holding him.

initial: I'm panicking! Tell me what to do!
attempting_heimlich: I'm following your instructions, but it's not working!
object_expelled: I got it out, but he's not responding. What now?
victim_stabilized: He's breathing and crying. I think he's okay. I'm so relieved.

initial: Okay, I'm placing the baby on my forearm, head down. Now what?
attempting_heimlich: I did it! I saw something fly out of his mouth! Wait, I think he's still not breathing.
object_expelled: The object is out. Give me more instructions.

initial: He's not breathing at all! There's no sound.
attempting_heimlich: I still can't hear any breath. Just strangling.
object_expelled: Wait, I hear a gasp! He's trying to breathe! Yes, he's coughing and crying now.
victim_stabilized: He's breathing fine now. His color is coming back.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and assist with crowd control, but paramedics are needed.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive quickly with emergency medical equipment and provide first aid until ambulance arrives.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive and take over, providing oxygen and monitoring the child.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is bewildered but help calm down the family dog.

DISMISS.message: Dismiss as a prank, leading to tragic consequences.

title: House Fire with Entrapment
description: A family is trapped on the second floor of their burning home, with smoke filling the hallway.
initial_variations: Fire! Our house is on fire! We're trapped upstairs! I'm {caller_name}, my kids and I can't get out!
Help! There's smoke everywhere! I'm {caller_name}, I'm in the bedroom with my two children {victim_name1} and {victim_name2}. The stairs are on fire!
Please send help! My apartment complex is burning! I'm {caller_name} on the third floor. We can't get down!
Oh my God! The kitchen is in flames! I'm {caller_name}, my family is trapped in the upstairs hallway. Send fire trucks!

specific_details: smoke is coming through the vents
I wet towels under the door

initial: We're at {address_location}. The fire is on the first floor. Please send help!
trapped_in_room: Still at {address_location}. We're in the master bedroom.
firefighters_instructing: At {address_location}. I hear sirens! They're telling us to stay low.

initial: {specific_details}. I'm with {victim_name1} and {victim_name2}. {ambient_audio}.
trapped_in_room: The door is hot, and {ambient_audio} is getting louder. We're trapped.
firefighters_instructing: They're telling us to stay low and cover our mouths. {ambient_audio}.
victims_rescued: Everyone is accounted for. The house is still burning.

initial: I'm panicking! We're trying to get out the window but it's too high.
trapped_in_room: We're staying low, but the smoke is getting thick.
firefighters_instructing: I'm following their instructions, keeping the kids calm.
victims_rescued: We're all safe. The firefighters were amazing.

initial: Okay, I'm closing the door and putting towels under it. We're going to the window.
trapped_in_room: I hear sirens! They're shouting up to us. They say the ladder is coming.
firefighters_instructing: The firefighter on the window is telling us to wait. The ladder is almost here.
victims_rescued: We're already rescued. Thanks for the instructions earlier.

initial: The kids are crying, but we're all conscious.
trapped_in_room: {victim_name1} is coughing a lot. {victim_name2} is scared.
firefighters_instructing: They're climbing out the window onto the ladder! We're getting out!
victims_rescued: Everyone is breathing okay, but {victim_name1} might need oxygen.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and help evacuate, but need firefighters for the fire.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with ladder truck and rescue the family from the second floor.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat smoke inhalation but can't access the trapped family until fire is out.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives and rescues the family pet but can't help with the fire.

DISMISS.message: Dismiss as a false alarm, resulting in tragic loss.

title: Anaphylactic Shock
description: A teenager at a party has eaten something with peanuts and is going into anaphylactic shock; they have no EpiPen.
initial_variations: Help! My friend {victim_name} just ate a cookie with nuts and her throat is swelling! I'm {caller_name}, we're at a party!
This is {caller_name}! My boyfriend {victim_name} is having an allergic reaction! He can't breathe, his face is puffing up!
911! I'm {caller_name}, a kid here named {victim_name} just ate a peanut butter cup and now he's got hives and can't swallow!
Emergency! My sister {victim_name} is allergic to shellfish and someone served shrimp pasta. She's turning red and gasping! I'm {caller_name}.

specific_details: ate a cookie with almond flour
drank a smoothie with peanut butter

initial: We're at {address_location}. It's a house party, in the backyard.
symptoms_worsening: Still at {address_location}. The victim is on the grass.
epipen_located: At {address_location}. We found an EpiPen in someone's bag!

initial: {victim_name} {specific_details}. Now they have {ambient_audio}. Their face is swelling.
symptoms_worsening: {victim_name} can barely talk. {ambient_audio} is getting quieter. Lips are blue.
epipen_located: We have the EpiPen. {victim_name} is struggling but still conscious.
victim_stabilized: {victim_name} is breathing better after the EpiPen. Medics are checking vitals.

initial: I'm freaking out! I don't know what to do. They don't have an EpiPen!
symptoms_worsening: They're getting worse. I'm trying to keep them calm.
epipen_located: I'm holding the EpiPen, ready to use it.

initial: I don't think anyone has an EpiPen. We're asking around.
symptoms_worsening: Wait, someone just said they have an EpiPen in their car!
epipen_located: I have the EpiPen. It's orange and says 'EpiPen'.

initial: There's no EpiPen here yet.
epipen_located: Okay, I'm pulling off the blue cap. Pressing hard against the outer thigh... it's done!
victim_stabilized: The EpiPen already injected. They're responding.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and help clear a path for the ambulance, but medical care is urgent.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive quickly with medical equipment and oxygen, stabilizing the victim.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive and administer epinephrine, saving the life.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives confused, but they help calm the party crowd.

DISMISS.message: Dismiss as a prank, leading to a preventable death.

title: Near Drowning
description: A child is pulled from a pool unresponsive after a near-drowning incident.
initial_variations: Oh God, we just pulled a kid out of the pool! He's not breathing! I'm {caller_name}, I'm with {victim_name} by the poolside!
Help! My daughter {victim_name} was underwater for too long! We got her out but she's blue! I'm {caller_name}!
Emergency at the community pool! A child named {victim_name} drowned! Someone get him out! I'm {caller_name}.
Please help! My grandson {victim_name} fell in the pool and isn't moving! I'm {caller_name}, we need an ambulance!

specific_details: parent turned away for a moment

initial: At {address_location}, the pool behind the house!
rescued_from_water: We're at {address_location}. The child is on the deck.
child_breathing: At {address_location}. The child is breathing again!

initial: {victim_name} is {victim_age}. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
rescued_from_water: He's not responding. {ambient_audio} around us. We've called for help.
cpr_attempted: I've done 30 compressions. We're waiting for a breath.
child_breathing: He's coughing up water. He's crying. His color is returning.

initial: We just got him out of the water. He's on the pool deck, not conscious.
cpr_attempted: I'm doing chest compressions like you said. It's exhausting.
child_breathing: I'm by his side, keeping him warm.

initial: I need instructions. He's not breathing!
rescued_from_water: Okay, I'm placing my hands on his chest. Pushing hard and fast.
cpr_attempted: I'm continuing CPR. He's still not breathing.

initial: He's not breathing at all.
rescued_from_water: No breath after pulling him out.
cpr_attempted: Wait! He coughed! Water came out. He's breathing now! He's breathing!
child_breathing: He's taking deep breaths now. Crying loudly.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and help secure the scene, but paramedics are essential.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with rescue equipment and start CPR until ambulance comes.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive and take over, transporting the child to the hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is confused but helps move bystanders away.

DISMISS.message: Dismiss as a prank call; the child does not receive timely help.

title: Cardiac Arrest
description: A woman calls because her husband has collapsed, clutching his chest, and is not breathing.
initial_variations: My husband just collapsed! He's not breathing! I'm {caller_name}, help! {victim_name} is turning blue!
This is {caller_name}. {victim_name} is having a heart attack! He's clutching his chest, eyes rolled back!
Emergency! My friend {victim_name} went down in the gym. No pulse! I'm {caller_name}, we're in the weight room!
Please send an ambulance! My father {victim_name} is unresponsive! I'm {caller_name}, I don't know CPR!

initial: We're at {address_location}. In the living room. Please hurry!
aed_available: {address_location}. I've got the AED from the building's gym.
victim_stabilized: We're at {address_location}. The paramedics are here now.

initial: {victim_name} {specific_details}. He just collapsed. {ambient_audio}.
cpr_in_progress: He's on the floor. {ambient_audio}. I've been doing CPR for 2 minutes.
aed_available: The AED is analyzing. It says 'shock advised'. {ambient_audio} has stopped.
victim_stabilized: The shock worked. {victim_name} has a pulse and is breathing.

initial: I'm shaking. He's not breathing. I called 911 immediately.
cpr_in_progress: I'm doing chest compressions. I'm so scared I'll break a rib.
aed_available: I've placed the AED pads. The machine is talking to me.
victim_stabilized: I'm with him, holding his hand. He's awake but confused.

initial: Okay, I'm putting the heel of my hand on his chest. Pushing 2 inches deep.
cpr_in_progress: I'm doing 30 compressions and 2 breaths. He's not responding.
aed_available: The AED says to continue CPR. I'm doing it.
victim_stabilized: We already used the AED. No CPR needed now.

initial: Is there an AED nearby? I don't know!
cpr_in_progress: Wait, there's an AED in the lobby. Someone fetch it!
aed_available: Okay, the AED is shocking. Stand clear! Delivered. It says resume CPR.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and start CPR until paramedics take over.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with an AED and advanced medical equipment.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive and take over the resuscitation, stabilizing the patient.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives bewildered; they help keep the family pet away from the scene.

DISMISS.message: Dismiss as a prank, resulting in a preventable cardiac death.

title: Gunshot Victim in Alley
description: A bystander discovers a person with a gunshot wound bleeding heavily in an alley. The victim is unresponsive.
initial_variations: Oh God, there's someone in the alley, they're bleeding everywhere! I think they've been shot! I'm {caller_name}, please help!
Help! I found a person lying in the alley and they're not moving, there's blood. This is {caller_name}!
There's a {victim_name} just lying here with a gunshot wound! I don't know if they're breathing. Please send an ambulance!
I'm {caller_name}, I was walking by and I saw {victim_name} get shot. They're bleeding a lot. I'm trying to help but I don't know what to do.

specific_details: The wound is in the chest
I hear sirens in the distance

initial: We're at {address_location}.
In the alley behind the diner at {address_location}.
applying_pressure: Still at {address_location}, I'm putting pressure on the wound.
victim_responsive: Yeah, {address_location}. He's talking a bit now.
victim_stable: We're at {address_location}. The bleeding has slowed.

initial: I just found him, no idea. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
applying_pressure: Gunshot to the chest, I think. {ambient_audio}. {specific_details}.
victim_responsive: He said it was a robbery. {specific_details}.

initial: I'm shaking, I've never seen this much blood.
applying_pressure: I'm using my shirt to stop the bleeding. It's not stopping.
victim_responsive: I'm still here, he's awake now. I'm trying to keep him calm.
victim_stable: I'm okay, just relieved. I'm worried about him.

initial: They're not moving, I think they're unconscious!
victim_responsive: He's awake but weak, says he's cold.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police secure the scene and provide first aid until EMS arrives.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters assist with crowd control and provide basic medical support.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics stabilize the victim and transport to the hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives, confused, but they can call for backup.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank. The victim bleeds out.

title: Electrocution by Downed Power Line
description: A caller reports someone being electrocuted by a live wire after a storm. The victim is convulsing and can't let go.
initial_variations: There's a downed power line and a person is touching it! They're shaking and can't move! I'm {caller_name}.
Oh my god, someone is being electrocuted right in front of me! A tree fell on a power line and they're trapped! {caller_name} here.
Help! A {victim_name} stepped on a live wire and is being shocked! I can't get close. I'm {caller_name}.
I'm {caller_name}, there's a person getting electrocuted. Sparks are flying. Please send help fast!

address_location: 1234 Oak Lane, corner near the park
specific_details: They're lying on the ground still

initial: We're at {address_location}. The wire is across the sidewalk.
warning_others: Still at {address_location}. I'm keeping everyone away.
power_cut: The power just went out! We're at {address_location}.
victim_free: We're at {address_location}. He's moved away from the wire now.

initial: {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}. I think they grabbed it.
warning_others: I'm telling others to stay back. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.

initial: I'm scared, I don't want to get too close.
warning_others: I'm shouting at neighbors to stay away.
power_cut: I'm relieved but still worried about the victim.
victim_free: I'm staying with him, he's unconscious.

initial: They're convulsing, can't let go!
warning_others: Still shaking violently, smoke coming from their clothes.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and cordon off the area, keeping people safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department cuts power and rescues the victim from the live wire.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat severe electrical burns and provide cardiac support.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is unequipped for electrical hazards.

DISMISS.message: Dismissed as a hoax; the victim dies from electrocution.

title: Severe Asthma Attack
description: A caller is having a life-threatening asthma attack and can barely speak. Their inhaler is empty.
initial_variations: Can't. breathe. asthma. {caller_name}. help.
I'm {caller_name}, my inhaler is empty! I can't breathe! Help!
Asthma. severe. can't talk. I'm {caller_name}.
I need an ambulance! I'm {caller_name} and I'm having the worst asthma attack of my life. Hurry!

address_location: Office building at 200 Business Park Dr
specific_details: I used my rescue inhaler but it's empty
I have a history of severe asthma

initial: I'm at... {address_location}... (wheeze).
No inhaler... {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
recovery_position: I know I need to sit up but I can't. {specific_details}.

initial: Bad... really bad... I'm dizzy.
recovery_position: I'm trying to stay calm... on my back.
breathing_improved: A little easier... I think help is coming.

initial: Yes, asthma... many years...
severe_distress: I usually have inhaler... empty now...

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive but lack medical equipment; they provide oxygen until EMS.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with oxygen and breathing treatments, stabilizing the caller.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics administer nebulized albuterol and transport to ER.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control can't help with respiratory distress.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank; the caller loses consciousness and suffers brain damage.

title: Car into Building with Gas Leak
description: A vehicle crashed into a building, causing a gas line rupture. Multiple occupants are trapped, and there's a strong gas smell.
initial_variations: A car just plowed into the building! I smell gas! People are screaming inside! I'm {caller_name}!
Help! A car crashed into the building! I smell gas! I'm {caller_name}, send everyone!
I'm {caller_name}, there's a disaster here! A car hit the building and there's a strong smell of gas. People are trapped!
Gas leak! A car crashed and now there's a hissing sound and smell. This is {caller_name}, we need fire and rescue fast!

specific_details: The car is smoking but no fire yet
I can hear people yelling inside

initial: We're at {address_location}. The car is inside the front of the building.
evacuating: At {address_location}, I'm getting everyone out the back.
gas_shut_off: {address_location}. The gas company is here cutting it off.

initial: {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}. I don't know how many inside.
gas_shut_off: Gas is off, but building unstable. {specific_details}.

initial: I'm outside, I saw it happen. I'm okay but shaken.
evacuating: Helping people out, keeping clear of the gas.
gas_shut_off: Relieved, but still worried about trapped people.
victims_extricated: I'm fine, just get medical for the injured.

initial: I see at least two people in the car, and others inside the building.
evacuating: One is unconscious, others are moving but stuck.
gas_shut_off: Firefighters are cutting them out. Two critical.
victims_extricated: All three are out, one unresponsive.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police block off the area and direct evacuees away from the gas.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department shuts off gas and uses extrication tools to free victims.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat multiple trauma victims and gas inhalation cases.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives but cannot handle a gas leak.

DISMISS.message: The call is ignored; an explosion occurs, killing several.

title: Industrial Chemical Exposure
description: A factory worker has been exposed to a toxic chemical and is having convulsions and respiratory distress.
initial_variations: Oh my god, there's been a chemical spill! My coworker is down and shaking! I'm {caller_name}, we need hazmat!
I'm {caller_name} at {company_name}, a tank ruptured and {victim_name} breathed it in. He's convulsing! Help!
Chemical emergency! I'm {caller_name}, someone's been exposed to a toxic agent. He's unconscious and barely breathing.
Hazmat needed! A worker here inhaled something, they're seizing! This is {caller_name}, hurry!

initial: We're at {address_location}. The incident is in the mixing area.
decontamination: Still at {address_location}. We moved him to a safe zone.
victim_stabilized: {address_location}. Ambulance is in the parking lot.

initial: {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}. It's a liquid leak.
victim_stabilized: He's breathing easier but still rash. {specific_details}.

initial: I'm fine, I was in the next room. But I'm worried.
decontamination: I'm helping with the safety shower. I have gloves on.
victim_stabilized: I'm okay, just a little shaken.
chemical_identified: I'm coordinating with the safety team.

initial: He's on the ground, twitching, breathing labored.
decontamination: Seizures stopped, but he's unconscious and his skin is red.
chemical_identified: He's conscious but confused, says it hurts to breathe.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive but cannot enter the hazmat zone; they secure the perimeter.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire hazmat team neutralizes the spill and decontaminates the victim.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics provide advanced life support and transport to a burn center.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is not equipped for chemical incidents.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a false alarm; the victim dies from respiratory failure.

title: Severe Traumatic Amputation in Factory
description: A panicked worker calls 911 reporting a coworker's arm has been severed by a hydraulic press, with massive blood loss.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name}! {victim_name} just lost his arm in the press! Please send help!
{caller_name} calling, it's {victim_name}! His arm is severed, oh God! I can hear {ambient_audio}.
Help! We're at the factory and {victim_name} got caught in the machine! I'm {caller_name}, please send an ambulance now!
Oh no, oh no! {victim_name}'s arm is off! There's blood everywhere! {ambient_audio}. This is {caller_name}, we need paramedics!

ambient_audio: a loud bang from the press
specific_details: The press cycled again after the accident
I can't find the stop button

initial: We're at {address_location}. It's the main factory floor near the big hydraulic press.
applying_tourniquet: Still at {address_location}. I'm in the first aid station now, trying to stop the blood.
bleeding_controlled: Address is {address_location}. We managed to slow the bleeding.

initial: The hydraulic press malfunctioned and {victim_name} got his arm caught. {specific_details}. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
applying_tourniquet: I've got a belt around his upper arm. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
bleeding_controlled: The tourniquet is holding. {specific_details}. He's pale but conscious.
paramedics_arrived: Paramedics are assessing him now. They say {specific_details}.

initial: I'm panicking but I'm trying to help. I've sent someone to call the supervisor.
applying_tourniquet: I've got a tourniquet on him. I'm tightening it as much as I can.
bleeding_controlled: The bleeding seems to be slowing down. He's still conscious but weak.
paramedics_arrived: The paramedics are here! I'm stepping back and letting them work.

initial: He's screaming in pain. There's a lot of blood on the floor. I think he's going into shock.
applying_tourniquet: He's quieter now, but he's losing color. I'm comforting him.
bleeding_controlled: The bleeding is under control for now. He's shivering but he's talking a little.
paramedics_arrived: The paramedics have taken over. They're starting an IV and giving him oxygen.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to secure the scene and assist with escorting the ambulance.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with heavy equipment and help paramedics stabilize the victim.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive and provide advanced trauma care, transporting the victim to a trauma center.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives and is confused by the industrial accident.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a hoax. The victim bleeds out without help.

title: Opioid Overdose, Not Breathing
description: A caller finds their friend unconscious and not breathing after injecting heroin. Naloxone is available but the caller is panicking.
initial_variations: I'm {caller_name}, my friend {victim_name} is not breathing! I think he overdosed. Please help!
Help! {victim_name} took something and now he's not responding. I can hear {ambient_audio}. I'm {caller_name}, please send someone!
{caller_name} here. {victim_name} is not breathing after shooting up. We have naloxone but I don't know how to use it!
It's {caller_name}, my friend {victim_name} is dying! His lips are blue. {ambient_audio}. Please hurry!

specific_details: The needle is still in his arm
There's drug paraphernalia on the table
He's been using for a while

initial: We're at {address_location}. Please hurry, he's turning blue!
administering_naloxone: Still at {address_location}. I'm trying to give him the naloxone.
breathing_resumed: He's breathing again at {address_location}. He's not fully awake.
victim_rousing: He's coming around at {address_location}. Paramedics just got here.

initial: We found him on the floor. {specific_details}. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
breathing_resumed: He's breathing shallowly now. {specific_details}. The naloxone worked.
victim_rousing: He's mumbling now. {specific_details}. The paramedics are taking over.

initial: I'm really scared. I'm trying to wake him up, but he's not moving.
administering_naloxone: I'm giving him the naloxone, one spray in his nostril. Come on, wake up!
breathing_resumed: He started breathing again! I'm putting him in the recovery position.
victim_rousing: He's waking up. I'm staying with him until help arrives.

initial: He's completely unresponsive. No breathing, no pulse that I can feel. His lips are blue.
administering_naloxone: Still no response. I just gave him naloxone, waiting for it to work.
breathing_resumed: He's breathing but very slowly. He's still unconscious but I can see his chest moving.
victim_rousing: He's opening his eyes now, but he's confused and nauseous.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to secure the scene and assist with any potential drug investigation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with medical supplies and assist with naloxone administration.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics provide advanced life support and administer additional naloxone, saving the victim.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is confused about why they were dispatched to a drug overdose.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a prank. The victim dies from respiratory failure.

title: Child Pinned Under Fallen Tree
description: During a storm, a tree fell on a child in the backyard. Caller can't lift it, child is conscious but trapped.
initial_variations: My {victim_relation} {victim_name} is trapped under a tree! Please help! I'm {caller_name}, I can't lift it!
{caller_name} calling! A tree just fell on {victim_name}! He's stuck and I can hear {ambient_audio}. Send someone!
Help! My child {victim_name} is pinned by a fallen tree in the backyard! I'm {caller_name}, please hurry!
Oh God, {victim_name} is under the tree! It came down in the storm. I'm {caller_name}, I can't get him out!

specific_details: The tree is an old oak
I can see his foot under the trunk

initial: We're at {address_location}. The tree fell in the backyard near the swing set.
attempting_to_lift: Still at {address_location}. I'm trying to lift the tree but it's too heavy.
tree_stabilized: We've got a car jack under the tree at {address_location}. It's not moving now.
child_freed: He's out! We're at {address_location}. He's hurt but conscious.

initial: The whole tree came down during the storm. {specific_details}. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
attempting_to_lift: I'm trying to use a lever from the shed. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
tree_stabilized: We've wedged some logs under it. {specific_details}. He's still trapped but not crushed further.
child_freed: He's freed! {specific_details}. He has some cuts but he's awake.

initial: I'm in shock but I'm trying to think. I've told someone to call 911 while I try to lift it.
attempting_to_lift: I'm trying to lift it with a 2x4, but I can barely move it. I need help!
tree_stabilized: I've got a jack under it now and it's not shifting. I'm staying with him.
child_freed: We managed to pull him out! I'm holding him and keeping him calm.

initial: He's crying and saying his leg hurts. He can't move, but he's talking to me.
attempting_to_lift: He's getting scared. The tree is heavy on his leg. He's still awake.
tree_stabilized: He's a bit calmer now that the tree isn't moving. His breathing is okay.
child_freed: He's out but his leg looks broken. He's in a lot of pain but he's coherent.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to help secure the scene and assist with the rescue.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters use hydraulic rescue tools to lift the tree and free the child.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics stabilize the child and transport to the hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is dispatched by mistake and can't assist with the tree.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a non-emergency. The child remains trapped and suffers further injury.

title: Explosion in Residential Kitchen
description: A gas stove explosion has caused severe burns and structural collapse, trapping a family member.
initial_variations: {caller_name} here! The kitchen just exploded! {victim_name} is inside, I can't see him. {ambient_audio}.
Oh my God, there was a loud bang! {victim_name} is trapped in the kitchen! I'm {caller_name}, please send help!
Help! The gas stove blew up and my {victim_relation} {victim_name} is in there! I'm {caller_name}, I don't know what to do!
Emergency! An explosion in the kitchen! {victim_name} was cooking and now I can't find him. {ambient_audio}. This is {caller_name}.

specific_details: The stove was leaking gas for days
There's fire spreading to the curtains
I heard a hissing sound before it blew

initial: We're at {address_location}. The kitchen is at the back of the house.
searching_for_victim: Still at {address_location}. I'm trying to get into the kitchen but it's blocked.
victim_found: I found him at {address_location}. He's badly burned but I'm pulling him out.
firefighters_arrived: They're here at {address_location}. The fire truck is outside.

initial: Everything happened so fast. {specific_details}. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
victim_found: He's under a collapsed cabinet. {specific_details}. I need help moving it.
firefighters_arrived: Firefighters are extinguishing the fire. {specific_details}. They're taking over.

initial: I'm frantic. I'm heading towards the kitchen but it's chaotic.
searching_for_victim: I'm yelling his name and trying to clear the rubble. I can't see him yet.
victim_found: I see him! He's moving! I'm pulling debris off him. Help is on the way, right?
firefighters_arrived: They're here! I'm pointing them to the kitchen. I'm staying out of their way.

initial: I don't know! I can't see him. There's so much smoke and fire.
searching_for_victim: I still haven't found him. I'm afraid he might be unconscious under something.
victim_found: He's badly burned on his arms and face. He's moaning. He can't move on his own.
firefighters_arrived: The firefighters have him now. They're putting him on a stretcher with oxygen.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to secure the area and control traffic for emergency vehicles.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters extinguish the fire, perform search and rescue, and treat the victim.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat severe burns and transport the victim to a burn unit.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is unable to assist with a structural fire.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a false alarm. The victim succumbs to smoke inhalation.

title: Suffocation in Grain Silo
description: A farm worker is trapped in a grain silo, sinking in corn and unable to breathe.
initial_variations: Help! {victim_name} is trapped in the grain silo! He's sinking! I'm {caller_name}, please send rescue!
{caller_name} here. My worker {victim_name} fell into the corn silo. He's struggling to breathe! {ambient_audio}.
Oh no, {victim_name} is in the silo and the corn is up to his chest! I'm {caller_name}, we need help now!
Emergency at the farm! {victim_name} is engulfed in the grain silo. I can hear {ambient_audio}. This is {caller_name}, hurry!

specific_details: We were loading corn when he fell
There's a crust of mold on top

initial: At {address_location}. The silo is the big blue one by the barn.
trying_to_reach_victim: Still at {address_location}. I'm on top of the silo trying to throw him a rope.
breathing_aided: We're at {address_location}. I've got a rope around him and he's not sinking further.
rescued: They got him out! We're at {address_location}. Paramedics are checking him.

initial: He fell into the corn and it's like quicksand. {specific_details}. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
trying_to_reach_victim: I've lowered a rope but he can't grab it. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
breathing_aided: We cut the power to the auger. {specific_details}. He's able to breathe but still trapped.
rescued: Rescue workers used a cofferdam to stop the flow. {specific_details}. He's out with minor injuries.

initial: I'm panicking. I'm trying to shut off the equipment so he doesn't get pulled under.
trying_to_reach_victim: I've stopped the auger. Now I'm trying to figure out how to get him out. I won't go in myself.
breathing_aided: He's got a rope harness now. We're stabilizing him but we need professional rescue.
rescued: I'm with him now. He's shaken up but alive. Thank God.

initial: He's waist-deep and sinking slowly. He can't move his legs. He's calling for help.
trying_to_reach_victim: He's up to his chest now. The grain is very heavy. He's still talking but scared.
breathing_aided: He's held in place but breathing with difficulty. The grain is pressing on his chest.
rescued: He's out! He's coughing but otherwise okay. No broken bones, just exhaustion.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to coordinate rescue and secure the scene.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters with technical rescue training use grain rescue equipment to extricate the victim.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat for possible crush syndrome and hypoxia.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is not equipped for a grain entrapment.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a farm prank. The victim suffocates as the grain engulfs him.
